info.name: Mail Sender API
info.description: API collection for Mail Sender Service - Resume upload and email sending

request.description: Upload a resume file that will be attached to all outgoing emails. Supported formats: PDF, DOC, DOCX. Maximum size: 10MB.

body.raw:
{
  "to": "hiring@company.com",
  "subject": "Application for Software Developer Position",
  "message": "Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to express my interest in the Software Developer position at your company. I have extensive experience in Java, Spring Boot, and modern web technologies.

Please find my resume attached for your review. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my skills and experience align with your team's needs.

Thank you for your consideration.

Best regards,
Satish Yadav
Email: yadavsatish.ssy02@gmail.com"
}

request.description: Send an email with resume attachment to a specific recipient. Requires: to (email), subject, and message.

body.raw:
{
  "to": "hr@techcompany.com",
  "subject": "Application for Senior Java Developer - Satish Yadav",
  "message": "Dear Hiring Team,

I am excited to apply for the Senior Java Developer position at TechCompany. With my strong background in Spring Boot, microservices architecture, and cloud technologies, I am confident I can contribute significantly to your team.

Key highlights of my experience:
- 5+ years of Java/Spring Boot development
- Expertise in building scalable REST APIs
- Experience with MySQL, PostgreSQL, and MongoDB
- Strong understanding of microservices and cloud platforms

I have attached my detailed resume for your review. I would be thrilled to discuss how my skills align with your requirements.

Thank you for considering my application.

Best regards,
Satish Yadav
Phone: +91-XXXXXXXXXX
Email: yadavsatish.ssy02@gmail.com
LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/satish-yadav"
}

request.description: Example of a detailed job application email with resume attachment.
Manually trigger the cold email batch for testing. This will send up to 20 cold emails to prospects from the database who haven't been contacted yet.
Check if the mail service is running and healthy.
